name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA)
description: Provides 100 days of guaranteed wage employment to rural households.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
description: Offers skill training and certification to youth for better employment opportunities.

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana (DDU-GKY)
description: Promotes skill development and placement for rural youth.

name: Pradhan Mantri Rojgar Protsahan Yojana (PMRPY)
description: Incentivizes employers to generate new employment by providing EPF support.

name: National Career Service (NCS)
description: Online platform connecting job seekers with employers, training providers, and career counselors.

name: Prime Minister’s Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
description: Provides financial assistance to set up micro-enterprises in rural and urban areas.

name: Start-up India Scheme
description: Promotes entrepreneurship and innovation with funding and incubation support.

name: Stand-Up India Scheme
description: Provides loans to SC/ST and women entrepreneurs for setting up enterprises.

name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS)
description: Encourages apprenticeship training by sharing costs with employers.

name: Skill India Mission
description: Umbrella initiative to train youth in industry-relevant skills.

name: Atal Innovation Mission (AIM)
description: Encourages innovation and entrepreneurship through incubation centers and labs.

name: Make in India
description: Promotes manufacturing and industrial growth to generate employment.

name: Digital India Programme
description: Expands digital infrastructure and skills to create IT-based jobs.

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
description: Provides collateral-free loans to small and micro enterprises.

name: Self Employment and Talent Utilization (SETU)
description: Supports self-employment and startups with funding and mentoring.

name: National Rural Livelihood Mission (NRLM) - Aajeevika
description: Promotes self-employment and skill development for rural poor.

name: Pradhan Mantri Shram Yogi Maandhan (PM-SYM)
description: Provides pension support for unorganized sector workers.

name: Garib Kalyan Rojgar Abhiyaan
description: Employment initiative for migrant workers affected by COVID-19.

name: National Skill Development Corporation (NSDC)
description: Implements skill development programmes across sectors.

name: Industrial Training Institutes (ITI) Modernization Programme
description: Upgrades ITIs to provide modern vocational training for employment.
